features.name: Project Scaffold
features.description: Monorepo structure. FastAPI backend with async SQLAlchemy. React + Vite frontend using Bun. Docker Compose with Postgres and Redis services. Environment variable config via pydantic-settings.

features.name: Localization Setup
features.description: Configure i18next with Arabic as default (RTL) and English as fallback. Create ar.json and en.json in src/locales/. Apply dir='rtl' globally. Use CSS logical properties throughout.

features.name: Database Models & Migrations
features.description: SQLAlchemy async models with BaseMixin (id UUID, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted). Models: User, Product, Customer, Transaction. Alembic configured and initial migration generated.

features.name: Auth — JWT Login
features.description: POST /auth/login endpoint. bcrypt password verification. JWT issued with role claim. AuthMiddleware decodes token and attaches current_user + roles to request state.

features.name: RBAC Middleware & Dependencies
features.description: Role-based access control enforced via FastAPI dependencies (deps.py). Guards: require_admin, require_designer, require_sales. Applied at router level.

features.name: Middleware — Global Error Handler
features.description: Middleware wrapping all requests. HorizonException → log warning, return structured 4xx JSON. Unhandled Exception → log stack trace, POST to SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL, return 500 JSON.

features.name: Middleware — Redis Cache
features.description: CacheBackend abstract class (get, set, delete, invalidate_prefix). RedisCache implementation using REDIS_URL env var. TTLs: catalog 10min, route 5min, insights 2min. Injected as FastAPI dependency.

features.name: Catalog API
features.description: GET /products (Redis-cached, all roles). POST /products and PUT /products/{id} (Designer/Admin only, invalidates cache). Pydantic schemas with name_ar and name_en fields.

features.name: Route & Customer API
features.description: GET /my-route returns customers assigned to today's day for the authenticated Sales Rep. GET /customers/{id}/insights returns total_debt, last_payment_date, last_payment_amount, avg_payment_interval_days, risk_score.

features.name: Orders & Payments API
features.description: POST /orders (Sales). POST /payments supporting Cash and Check types, multi-currency (ILS/USD/JOD). Exchange rate stored in Transaction.data JSONB at time of recording.

features.name: Returned Check Workflow
features.description: PUT /checks/{id}/status to mark a check as Returned. Service layer: set check status to Returned, create a Check_Return transaction (positive amount re-debits customer), link via related_transaction_id.

features.name: Customer Statement API
features.description: GET /customers/{id}/statement with query params: start_date, end_date, since_zero_balance (bool). Returns chronological transaction list with running balance after each entry.

features.name: Admin Stats API
features.description: GET /admin/stats/sales — sales by rep and period. GET /admin/stats/debt — total outstanding, by city/route. POST /admin/customers/import — bulk CSV upload for customer creation.

features.name: Daily Route View
features.description: Landing screen after login for Sales role. Lists today's customers from GET /my-route. Each row shows customer name, city, and current balance. Tapping opens the Customer Dashboard.

features.name: Customer Dashboard
features.description: Shown on customer selection. Displays: Total Debt, Last Collection (date + amount), Collection Frequency, Risk Indicator (Green/Yellow/Red). Action buttons: Order, Pay, Statement, Returned Check.

features.name: Catalog & Order Flow
features.description: Browse catalog with Best Sellers and Discounted sections. Arabic/English search. Add items to order. Submit order via POST /orders. Catalog available offline via React Query cache.

features.name: Payment Collection Flow
features.description: Cash payment form (amount + currency selector). Check payment form (bank, due date, amount, photo upload). Submit via POST /payments.

features.name: Customer Statement View
features.description: Date range picker with presets (Last Week, Last Month, Last Year) and 'Since Zero' toggle. Chronological transaction list with running balance. Displays returned checks explicitly.

features.name: Offline Sync
features.description: Orders and payments created offline stored in IndexedDB sync queue. Flushed automatically when connectivity resumes. Catalog and customer route cached via React Query with long staleTime. Conflict resolution: server is authoritative.

features.name: Product Management UI
features.description: Create and edit products: name_ar, name_en, SKU, price, image upload, Discounted flag, Best Seller flag. Image stored and URL saved to product record.

features.name: Insights Dashboard
features.description: Sales performance charts by rep and by period. Debt overview: total outstanding, by city/route. Overdue checks list. Powered by GET /admin/stats/sales and GET /admin/stats/debt.

features.name: EOD Report Generation
features.description: Automated daily summary per Sales Rep: total cash collected (by currency), total check value, new orders placed. Sent to Accounting at end of day.
